notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Matthew Liberatore picks off Michael Stefanic at 1st on throw to first baseman Alec Burleson.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Masyn Winn singles on a ground ball to right fielder Colby Thomas. Nolan Gorman to 3rd. Masyn Winn to 2nd. Nolan Gorman advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by right fielder Colby Thomas.

notableEvents.label: Nick Kurtz grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Nick Kurtz hits a grand slam (6) to center field. Darell Hernaiz scores. Michael Stefanic scores. Shea Langeliers scores.

notableEvents.label: Iván Herrera GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Iván Herrera grounds into a double play, third baseman Zack Gelof to second baseman Michael Stefanic to first baseman Nick Kurtz. JJ Wetherholt out at 2nd. Iván Herrera out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Masyn Winn picked off and caught stealing home, catcher Jonah Heim to third baseman Zack Gelof to catcher Jonah Heim to third baseman Zack Gelof. Nathan Church to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Brent Rooker flies out to right fielder Jordan Walker. Throwing error by right fielder Jordan Walker.

notableEvents.label: José Fermín pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: José Fermín singles on a fly ball to center fielder Henry Bolte.

notableEvents.label: JJ Wetherholt plunked
notableEvents.detail: JJ Wetherholt hit by pitch. José Fermín to 2nd.
